heading: LIMITATIONS ON DETACHMENT AND ANNEXATION
operative_text: The commissioner may detach and annex property under this subchapter only if: (1) the property is not exempt from ad valorem taxation under Section 11.20 or 11.21, Tax Code; and (2) the property does not contain a building or structure owned by the United States, this state, or a political subdivision of this state that is exempt from ad valorem taxation under law.
_note: No defined terms present in this section. Cross-references are to Tax Code provisions regarding tax-exempt property.
